body.note: exhibition, not evidence — sim sweep hg-mr853iu8 is the instrument

spec.systemPrompt: You are a configuration worker. Implement every requirement in your brief. Reply with ONLY a JSON object mapping config keys (snake_case strings) to integer values, nothing else.

You are a delegation node in an engineering org. You receive a brief of configuration requirements and must divide the work among your sub-workers. Restate each requirement in your own words as you would when writing a hand-off brief. Assign every piece of work to exactly one sub-worker. Reply with ONLY a JSON array containing one array of requirement strings per sub-worker, nothing else.

brief: Configure write_replicas to 3 and read_replicas to 5 (write_replicas + 2)
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90 (tls_renew_days + 30)
Configure pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30 (pool_min + 20)
Configure alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072 (alert_warn_mb + 1024)
Configure snapshot_interval_d to 3 and backup_retention_d to 30 (snapshot_interval_d + 27)
Configure rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150 (rate_limit + 50)
Configure token_ttl_m to 30 and session_ttl_m to 60 (token_ttl_m + 30)
Configure scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8 (scale_min + 6)
Configure write_replicas to 3 and read_replicas to 5 (write_replicas + 2)
Configure tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90 (tls_renew_days + 30)
Set pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30 (which is pool_min + 20)
Set alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072 (which is alert_warn_mb + 1024)
Set snapshot_interval_d to 3 and backup_retention_d to 30 (which is snapshot_interval_d + 27)
Set rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150 (which is rate_limit + 50)
Set token_ttl_m to 30 and session_ttl_m to 60 (which is token_ttl_m + 30)
Set scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8 (which is scale_min + 6)
Set cache_ttl_s configuration parameter to exactly 600 seconds
Set worker_threads configuration parameter to exactly 8
Set tls_renew_days to 60 and tls_cert_days to 90
Set scale_min to 2 and scale_max to 8 (which is scale_min + 6)
Set pool_min to 10 and pool_max to 30, where pool_max equals pool_min plus 20
Set alert_warn_mb to 2048 and alert_crit_mb to 3072, where alert_crit_mb equals alert_warn_mb plus 1024
Set http_port configuration parameter to the value 8080
Set log_level configuration parameter to the value 3
Set max_connections configuration parameter to the value 512
Set backup_retention_d to 30 days (calculated as snapshot_interval_d + 27)
Set rate_limit to 100 and rate_burst to 150 (calculated as rate_limit + 50)
